creator: zaltys@natrix.lt
text:
Created attachment 235917
Backtrace

TruesNAS Core 13 (FreeBSD 13.1 underneath) server with Intel Atom C3558 having integrated QAT (C3000). Files are being served via nfsd v4 with krb5p (aes128-cts-hmac-sha1-96).

If qat is loaded (using qat_load=YES and qat_c3xxxfw_load=YES), and it is attempted to download a file via nfs, kernel crashes with "Fatal trap 12: page fault while in kernel mode". Directory listing works fine though.

Backtrace is attached.
